metadata.methodology: Batch QA evaluation: generate questions -> answer with full/selected text -> grade by Gemini judge

per_article.title: Artificial intelligence-guided design of lipid nanoparticles
per_article.question: Which two specific ionizable lipid structures identified by the neural network were found to deliver mRNA locally to mouse muscle and nasal mucosa?

per_article.title: Fusogenic Coiled-Coil Peptides Enhance Lipid Nanoparticle-Me
per_article.question: Which specific pair of complementary coiled-coil peptides was utilized to trigger fusion between mRNA-LNPs and induced pluripotent stem-cell-derived cardiomyocytes (iPSC-CMs)?

per_article.title: Glucosamine oral bioavailability and plasma pharmacokinetics
per_article.question: At what specific dose did the pharmacokinetics of oral glucosamine sulfate cease to be dose-proportional in healthy volunteers?

per_article.title: Extraction and characterization of chickpea (Cicer arietinum
per_article.question: Based on in vitro digestibility studies, which chickpea protein fraction (albumins or globulins) was found to be more susceptible to proteolytic hydrolysis by enzymes such as papain and pepsin?

per_article.title: Affinity Maturation of B7-H6 Translates into Enhanced NK Cel
per_article.question: What specific domain of the B7-H6 protein was affinity matured to improve its binding affinity for the NK cell receptor NKp30?

per_article.title: Pharmacokinetics of trimethoprim/sulphachlorpyridazine in ho
per_article.question: How did mixing trimethoprim and sulphachlorpyridazine with concentrate affect their bioavailability in horses compared to administration via nasogastric tube?

per_article.title: AI-powered IC50 prediction for p53 inhibitors drug-target in
per_article.question: Which two types of graph-based neural network layers are sequentially stacked in the HDTI-IC50 model to capture both local structural information and long-range dependencies?

per_article.title: Targeting the Plasmodium vivax equilibrative nucleoside tran
per_article.question: According to the radiolabel substrate uptake inhibition experiments, which purine substrate had the lowest IC50 value for PvENT1?

per_article.title: Conservation of heterochromatin protein 1 function.
per_article.question: The chromodomain of which mammalian protein was shown to be able to functionally replace the chromodomain of the swi6p protein in Schizosaccharomyces pombe?

per_article.title: Gene Editing in B-Lymphoma Cell Lines Using CRISPR/Cas9 Tech
per_article.question: What method is used to achieve stable Cas9 expression in B-lymphoid cell lines before the transient delivery of sgRNA?
